name: Pepperoni Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bread dough, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Raise the dough.
2. Roll out on a floured board to the size of a medium pizza.
3. Spread pepperoni and mozzarella evenly to 1-inch border.
4. Roll up the dough like a jelly roll.
5. Curve into a horsehoe shape.
6. Grease a round pan and place the dough on the pan, brushing the top and sides lightly with oil.
7. Bake at 350 degrees in a preheated oven for 30 to 40 minutes until golden brown.
